rationale: The `certutil.exe` utility was used by an Administrator (A0) to download an executable file (`qSwUwejx.exe`) from a suspicious internal IP address and port (`10.0.2.13:8080`) into a temporary directory. Evidence EV-001 confirms the successful creation of this executable file. The parent command line (A0) also indicates an intent to execute this downloaded file, which is a common pattern for initial access or payload delivery.
